triggers.name: YD Session Wrap
triggers.description: Save session context to Memory and sync Obsidian

triggers.name: YD Memory Check
triggers.command: cd /Users/dex && echo '=== Memory Files ===' && ls -1 .claude/projects/-Users-dex-YD-2026/memory/*.md && echo '' && echo '=== Recent Wraps ===' && ls -lt .claude/projects/-Users-dex-YD-2026/memory/session_*_wrap.md 2>/dev/null | head -3
